SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.common

Interface ScalarValue

All Known Subinterfaces:
ScalarValue.BinaryValue, ScalarValue.DateValue, ScalarValue.DecimalValue, ScalarValue.DurationValue, ScalarValue.FloatValue, ScalarValue.IntegerValue, ScalarValue.ListScalarValue, ScalarValue.MapScalarValue, ScalarValue.StringValue, ScalarValue.TimestampValue, ScalarValue.TimeValue
All Known Implementing Classes:
ScalarValue.Binary, ScalarValue.BinaryView, ScalarValue.BooleanValue, ScalarValue.Date32, ScalarValue.Date64, ScalarValue.Decimal128, ScalarValue.Decimal256, ScalarValue.Decimal32, ScalarValue.Decimal64, ScalarValue.DictionaryValue, ScalarValue.DurationMicrosecond, ScalarValue.DurationMillisecond, ScalarValue.DurationNanosecond, ScalarValue.DurationSecond, ScalarValue.FixedSizeBinary, ScalarValue.FixedSizeListValue, ScalarValue.Float16, ScalarValue.Float32, ScalarValue.Float64, ScalarValue.Int16, ScalarValue.Int32, ScalarValue.Int64, ScalarValue.Int8, ScalarValue.IntervalDayTime, ScalarValue.IntervalMonthDayNano, ScalarValue.IntervalYearMonth, ScalarValue.LargeBinary, ScalarValue.LargeListValue, ScalarValue.LargeUtf8, ScalarValue.ListValue, ScalarValue.MapValue, ScalarValue.Null, ScalarValue.RunEndEncodedValue, ScalarValue.StructValue, ScalarValue.Time32Millisecond, ScalarValue.Time32Second, ScalarValue.Time64Microsecond, ScalarValue.Time64Nanosecond, ScalarValue.TimestampMicrosecond, ScalarValue.TimestampMillisecond, ScalarValue.TimestampNanosecond, ScalarValue.TimestampSecond, ScalarValue.UInt16, ScalarValue.UInt32, ScalarValue.UInt64, ScalarValue.UInt8, ScalarValue.UnionValue, ScalarValue.Utf8, ScalarValue.Utf8View
public sealed interface ScalarValue permits ScalarValue.DecimalValue, ScalarValue.DurationValue, ScalarValue.TimestampValue, ScalarValue.DateValue, ScalarValue.TimeValue, ScalarValue.IntegerValue, ScalarValue.FloatValue, ScalarValue.StringValue, ScalarValue.BinaryValue, ScalarValue.ListScalarValue, ScalarValue.MapScalarValue, ScalarValue.BooleanValue, ScalarValue.Null, ScalarValue.IntervalYearMonth, ScalarValue.IntervalMonthDayNano, ScalarValue.UnionValue, ScalarValue.DictionaryValue, ScalarValue.RunEndEncodedValue
A scalar value from DataFusion, representing a single typed value.

This sealed interface mirrors DataFusion's ScalarValue enum. Each variant is a record that holds the typed value, including complex types (List, Struct, Map, Dictionary, Union, and RunEndEncoded).

Use getObject() for untyped access returning a friendly Java type, or use instanceof with sealed subinterfaces (ScalarValue.IntegerValue, ScalarValue.FloatValue, ScalarValue.StringValue, ScalarValue.BinaryValue, ScalarValue.DecimalValue, ScalarValue.DurationValue, ScalarValue.TimestampValue, ScalarValue.DateValue, ScalarValue.TimeValue) for typed access without casting.

Example: 

ScalarValue intVal = new ScalarValue.Int32(42);
ScalarValue strVal = new ScalarValue.Utf8("hello");
ScalarValue boolVal = new ScalarValue.BooleanValue(true);
Object obj = intVal.getObject(); // Integer(42)
if (strVal instanceof ScalarValue.Utf8 utf8) {
    String s = utf8.value(); // "hello"
}
See Also:
  • Rust DataFusion: ScalarValue

    ScalarValue.LargeUtf8
     
    static interface 
    ScalarValue.ListScalarValue
    Sealed subinterface for list-like variants (List, LargeList, FixedSizeList), providing typed List access to the contained ScalarValue elements.
    static final record 
    ScalarValue.ListValue
    A list scalar value containing ordered elements.
    static interface 
    ScalarValue.MapScalarValue
    Sealed subinterface for map-like variants (Struct, Map), providing typed Map access to key-value data.
    static final record 
    ScalarValue.MapValue
    A map scalar value containing key-value entries.
    static final record

    A run-end encoded scalar value.

    A struct scalar value with named fields.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Object
    getObject()
    Returns this scalar value as its natural Java type.

  • Method Details

    • getObject

      Object getObject()
      Returns this scalar value as its natural Java type.

      The mapping follows Arrow Java conventions where consistent, and improves where Arrow returns raw primitives. For example, Date32 returns LocalDate rather than Integer.

      Returns:
      the value as a standard Java type, or null for ScalarValue.Null
